name: badges
description: Status indicator pill with optional leading/trailing icons. Supports 9 semantic types (Primary, Secondary, Tertiary, Success, Info, Warning, Danger, onEmphasis, Outlined), 3 sizes (Small, Medium, Large) and 2 styles (Bordered, Light). Outlined and onEmphasis only exist in Light style.

anatomy.notes: Container; flex row, h-auto, radius and padding vary by size
Optional leading icon; hidden if no left icon prop
Optional trailing icon; hidden if no right icon prop

a11y.notes: Badge is a presentational inline element. Wrap in a <span> with aria-label when used standalone. Parent context provides semantic role.
